_comment: Canonical template for importing a vacancy. All fields with '?' are optional.
notes: Команда поиска. Обязателен опыт в highload.

_fieldGuide.positionId: string — ID должности из defaultPositions.json (pos_frontend, pos_backend, pos_fullstack, pos_ios, pos_android, pos_devops, pos_qa, pos_analyst, pos_ds …)
_fieldGuide.grade: one of: intern | junior | middle | senior | lead | principal | staff
_fieldGuide.currency: one of: RUB | USD | EUR | KZT
_fieldGuide.employmentType: one of: full | part | contract | freelance
_fieldGuide.status: one of: open | closed | offer_made | hired
_fieldGuide.minRequirements: Обязательные требования. toolId — ID инструмента из toolTree.json. minYears — минимальный опыт в годах (number, опционально).
_fieldGuide.maxRequirements: Желательные требования (superset of min). Те же поля.
